label: Energetics / Binding Free Energy
description: Estimates ligand binding free energy using post-MD calculations (e.g., MM/PBSA, MM/GBSA) and decomposes contributions by residue and energy component.

defaultInputs.name: Input Trajectory or Structure
defaultInputs.tooltip: MD trajectory (XTC) or single complex structure (PDB).

defaultInputs.name: Topology File
defaultInputs.tooltip: Topology file (TPR/PRMTOP) required if input is a trajectory.

defaultOutputs.name: MMPBSA Results
defaultOutputs.tooltip: CSV containing binding free energy components (vdW, electrostatic, solvation).

defaultOutputs.name: Per-Residue Decomposition
defaultOutputs.tooltip: CSV detailing energetic contributions per residue.

defaultOutputs.name: PRODIGY Results
defaultOutputs.tooltip: JSON object with predicted DeltaG and Kd from PRODIGY.

defaultOutputs.name: Mutation DeltaDeltaG
defaultOutputs.tooltip: CSV containing predicted stability changes upon mutation.

configSchema.label: Topology File (.tpr)
configSchema.tooltip: GROMACS run input file containing topology and simulation parameters

configSchema.label: Trajectory File (.xtc)
configSchema.tooltip: Trajectory file from your MD simulation

configSchema.content: Provide an existing index file with group definitions
Define receptor and ligand groups by residue ranges

configSchema.label: Index File (.ndx)
configSchema.tooltip: Index file defining group names for receptor and ligand
